title: Legislação do Exame de Ordem
notes: Official index page for Exame de Ordem legal/rule documents such as CFOAB provimentos and Estatuto da OAB downloads. Use as a discovery/index source only; individual PDFs should be separate manifest rows when used.

title: Exame de Ordem em Números IV
notes: Operational first-phase discipline distribution source used by current exam-scope extractor.

title: Provimento n.º 144/2011 do CFOAB
notes: Base OAB Exame de Ordem rule used by current exam-scope extractor.

title: Provimento n.º 156/2013 do CFOAB
notes: Primary OAB rule source for the Exame de Ordem content universe. Art. 11 links the exam to professional-formation disciplines, Human Rights, Estatuto/Regulamento/Código de Ética, and possibly foundational-formation disciplines. Use to justify broad discipline families, not to classify individual questions by content.

title: Provimento n.º 212/2022 do CFOAB
notes: Later OAB provimento retained for source-chain analysis; current discipline extractor does not use it.

title: Resolução CNE/CES nº 2/2021 — Alteração do art. 5º da Resolução CNE/CES nº 5/2018
notes: Official amendment to the Law-course curriculum guidelines. Relevant because it changes the curricular taxonomy in art. 5. Taxonomy evidence only; keep separate from legal content corpus.

title: Resolução CNE/CES nº 2/2021 legacy local copy
notes: Legacy local copy used by current exam-scope extractor.

title: Resolução CNE/CES nº 5/2018 — Diretrizes Curriculares Nacionais do Curso de Graduação em Direito
notes: Official curriculum source for Law degrees. Use to understand the curricular axes and why foundational/professional/practical groups exist. Taxonomy evidence only; do not mix with statutes/codes for question-content extraction.

title: Resolução CNE/CES nº 5/2018 legacy local copy
notes: Legacy local copy used by current exam-scope extractor.

title: Parecer CNE/CES nº 635/2018 — Revisão das Diretrizes Curriculares do Curso de Direito
notes: Supporting official rationale for the 2018 Law-course curriculum guidelines. Useful for understanding why the taxonomy is organized this way. Not a primary norm; use only when taxonomy interpretation needs rationale.

title: Parecer CNE/CES nº 757/2020 — Alteração do art. 5º da Resolução CNE/CES nº 5/2018
notes: Supporting official rationale for the 2021 amendment to the Law-course curriculum guidelines. Not a primary norm; use only when interpreting the 2021 curriculum amendment.

title: Lei Complementar nº 95/1998 — Elaboração Redação Alteração e Consolidação das Leis
notes: Official drafting-structure reference for articles, paragraphs, incisos, alíneas, items, and higher-level groupings such as subsections, sections, chapters, titles, books, and parts. Reference source for parsing legal-text anatomy; do not mix with statutes/codes for question-content extraction.

title: Código de Ética e Disciplina da OAB
Regulamento Geral do Estatuto da Advocacia e da OAB
Provimento n. 205/2021 do CFOAB
notes: Relevant for advertising/marketing rules in professional ethics.

title: Código Civil
notes: Core civil-law source; also overlaps with business/company law.

title: Constituição da República Federativa do Brasil de 1988
notes: Core source for constitutional law; compiled text.

title: Consolidação das Leis do Trabalho
notes: Same raw source as labor law; later extraction should isolate labor-procedure articles/sections.

title: Código Comercial
notes: Partly revoked; keep because Planalto code index still lists it and maritime/commercial remnants may matter.

title: Regulamento da Previdência Social
notes: Regulatory source; keep separate from statutes.
